# Quarry Overlook

- **Length:** 0.8 km spur off the [Ridgeline Loop](ridgeline-loop.md)
- **Gain:** ~60 m
- **Surface:** dirt, exposed at the top

A short, steep spur to a railed overlook above the old quarry. Exposed — skip it
in weather, though [2026-05-17](../daily/2026-05-17.md) proves that advice is
routinely ignored.
